item.title: Floating LNG player confirms $5 billion green light for US Gulf project
item.description: Delfin Midstream reaches FID on first of three planned liquefaction vessels

item.title: US security agencies warn of cyberattacks on oil field equipment
item.description: Companies are being urged to consider taking their automatic tank gauge systems offline to prevent sabotage

item.title: Kazakh oilfield hits milestone with start-up of gas reinjection facility
item.description: Facility's long-awaited compressor will boost gas reinjection to allow higher oil production

item.title: UK North Sea industry in dark amid potential threat escalation
item.description: Industry says offshore platforms should be designated as critical national infrastructure

item.title: ExxonMobil to contract installation services for Guyana FPSO
item.description: Hammerhead field in Stabroek block is expected to start production in 2029

item.title: Adnoc selects contractors for $10 billion-plus giant offshore expansion
item.description: New expansion phase at Upper Zakum aims to increase field’s oil production capacity to up to 1.5 million barrels per day

item.title: Equinor tunes up Bay du Nord hunt for rock installation vessels
item.description: Chosen fallpipe vessel will have to place almost 330,000 tonnes of rock in 1200 metres of water

item.title: Chevron submits $13.8 billion plan for Argentina shale project
item.description: El Trapial block in Neuquen basin is company's crown jewel in Vaca Muerta

item.title: Frontier basin blocks offered in latest east Canada bid round
item.description: Acreage includes ultra-deepwater blocks in undrilled Salar basin

item.title: Clarity emerges on Hercules contract in Canada
item.description: Warm-stacked semisub will work on Suncor's Terra Nova field in Newfoundland & Labrador

item.title: Oslo based driller lands binding deal for semisub
item.description: Dolphin Drilling has secured long-term work for last of its three semisubs

item.title: Norwegian investor divests from drilling and geophysical player
item.description: HitecVision pockets Nkr1 billion in sale of shares

item.title: BP held talks with Ithaca Energy over North Sea exit
item.description: BP is only supermajor not to have pursued consolidation in UK North Sea

item.title: UK independent deal with Chevron hits roadblock in Angola
item.description: Local player Etu Energias breaks into Energean's deal with Chevron with demand of pre-emption rights

item.title: Top drilling contractors set sights on five-rig deepwater tender
item.description: India's ONGC in February surprised offshore drilling industry with new tender for hiring up to five specialised deepwater rigs across three categories

item.title: Operator nearing decision on Middle East greenfield prize
item.description: Commercial bids for Waset EPC offshore package due within days, with three contenders expected to submit offers to Adnoc

item.title: US player dishes out contract for latest offshore project
item.description: Murphy Oil selects Subsea7 for flowline work on String Music development

item.title: Shell’s US Gulf portfolio wins methane emissions certification
item.description: UK supermajor’s 10 assets in region earn Grade A mark from MiQ

item.title: New York sues Trump government over 'sham' offshore wind deal with TotalEnergies
item.description: Seven states lodge action claiming agreement that saw oil giant walk away from wind leases was 'blatantly unlawful'

item.title: Samsung Heavy secures $2.9 billion construction order for US FLNG vessel
item.description: Delfin LNG paying South Korean contractor to build first ship for offshore LNG project

item.title: Kazakh state oil company sees high oil prices offset impact of giant oilfield outage
item.description: Higher oil prices underpin KazMunayGaz earnings after Tengiz field outage hits equity production

item.title: BP sells 5% stake in giant Australia offshore gas development
item.description: Deal sees GS Energy acquire 5% stake in Woodside-operated Browse development

item.title: Strike action to hit Ithaca North Sea facilities
item.description: Bonus payments at heart of UK North Sea dispute

item.title: Bay du Nord FPSO could produce 10% more than nameplate capacity
item.description: Upstream dives deep into Equinor's development plan for challenging project offshore eastern Canada

item.title: ExxonMobil plans second super-sized FPSO to tackle gas offshore Guyana
item.description: Company plans to produce massive amounts of natural gas from Haimara field starting in 2031

item.title: Serica targets multi-well North Sea drilling campaign in 2027
item.description: UK independent expects to hit average annual production of 50,000 barrels of oil equivalent per day

item.title: Equinor's chairman resigns, replacement nominated
item.description: Jon Erik Reinhardsen has been chairman since 2017

item.title: Offshore installers team up to build new deepwater vessel
item.description: SBM and Solstad to form a joint venture to build a deepwater installation vessel by 2029

item.title: Santos keeps CCS dream alive offshore Timor-Leste
item.description: Australian operator needs Bayu-Undan to absorb carbon dioxide vented at Barossa field

item.title: Sinopec secures new acreage in domestic exploration push
item.description: State-owned major secures three more onshore blocks this year as it expands its domestic acreage portfolio
